headline: Artisan Global Opportunities Fund Q1 2026 Portfolio Activity
summary: During the quarter, we initiated new positions in Edwards Lifesciences, Eli Lilly and Roblox.

headline: How The Linde (LIN) Story Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Views And New Growth Plans
summary: Linde's updated fair value price target of $525.49, compared with the prior $516.41, reflects a modest shift in the underlying model assumptions rather than a sweeping reset. Recent analyst moves, with some firms lifting targets by more than $30 per share while others flag valuation and pricing pressure, provide a mixed but useful view of how the story is evolving. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these changing signals and keep up with the evolving narrative around Linde. Stay...
